findings.description: `dataTypeDefinitionLoader` is referenced as a property name in the XML code example (`<property name="dataTypeDefinitionLoader" ref="dataTypeDefinitionLoader"/>`) but is absent from the s10 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML example: `<property name="dataTypeDefinitionLoader" ref="dataTypeDefinitionLoader"/>` — a supporting component referenced in the domainDefinitionLoader configuration.
